overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a rain-soaked cyberpunk city at dusk, beginning with a street crossing and proceeding through narrow alleys, covered walkways, and finally emerging into a vast plaza surrounded by towering skyscrapers and holographic advertisements. The footage is from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring wet reflective surfaces, neon lighting, and dense urban architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban crosswalk with neon-lit commercial buildings

events.description: finishing crossing the street and stepping onto the wet sidewalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the rain-soaked street at a yellow zebra crossing, moving toward the sidewalk and the blue rotunda building

notable_agents.action: pedestrian holding a glowing green umbrella crossing the street ahead

entered.detail: distinctive circular building with blue roof and large digital advertisements
bold yellow striped pedestrian crossing on wet asphalt
illuminated advertisement showing food items on the left building

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a rainy dusk street crossing in a cyberpunk city. The camera moves across a yellow zebra crossing toward a distinctive blue rotunda building, surrounded by other pedestrians including one with a glowing green umbrella. Neon signs reflect off the wet pavement as the character steps onto the sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service alley between tall buildings with stairway

events.description: entering the narrow alleyway between dark concrete buildings
beginning to ascend the concrete stairs in the alley

agents.ego_description: walking into the narrow alley and climbing the concrete stairs between dark walls, moving toward the light above

notable_agents.action: person with orange umbrella descending the stairs toward the camera

entered.detail: steep concrete stairway leading upward between building walls
open dumpster with visible trash bags against the left wall
tall dark gray building walls enclosing the narrow passage

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a narrow, shadowed alley between towering concrete buildings, leaving the open street behind. It approaches and begins ascending a set of concrete stairs, passing a trash container and wall posters, while a figure with an orange umbrella descends toward the camera.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with shops and public seating

events.description: entering the covered walkway with reflective flooring and neon lighting
passing seated pedestrians on teal benches along the right wall

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered corridor, passing teal benches and neon-lit storefronts while following a child in a yellow jacket

notable_agents.action: child in yellow jacket and blue pants walking ahead along the corridor

entered.detail: turquoise-colored public seating along the right wall of the corridor
bright neon signage for shops including a prominent green and yellow sign
high walls of the covered walkway creating a canyon-like effect

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the stairs into a covered pedestrian walkway, the scene features polished reflective flooring, teal benches along the walls, and bright neon shop signs. The camera follows a child in a yellow jacket through this semi-enclosed space, passing other pedestrians and seated figures.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrowing corridor leading to open plaza exit

events.description: corridor narrows and lighting dims as the space constricts
approaching the bright exit opening into the large urban plaza

agents.ego_description: continuing through the narrowing passage toward the bright plaza exit, passing a blue kiosk structure on the left

notable_agents.action: man in dark suit walking ahead toward the plaza exit

entered.detail: small hexagonal blue booth with purple neon lighting and glass windows
tall white building with red vertical stripes visible at the corridor exit

changed.to: left_near and right_mid as space gradually opens

segments.scene_description: The walkway narrows into a darker corridor with the bright exit to a plaza visible ahead. The camera passes a distinctive blue kiosk booth on the left and follows a man in a suit toward the opening, where towering buildings become visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza surrounded by mega-skyscrapers and holographic ads

events.description: emerging from the narrow corridor into the vast open plaza
full reveal of the towering cyberpunk cityscape with massive holographic advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking into the expansive plaza and looking up at the massive holographic billboards and towering skyscrapers surrounding the area

entered.detail: massive floating digital advertisements and holographic displays on building facades
extremely tall futuristic buildings with glass and steel facades rising on all sides
tall orange structural pole with attached signs and lights

changed.to: center_near now in the plaza surrounded by buildings

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the corridor into a vast open plaza surrounded by massive cyberpunk skyscrapers. The scene opens up to reveal towering buildings covered in holographic advertisements and neon lighting, with the camera looking upward to take in the scale of the futuristic cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rain-slicked street crossing into the heart of a towering cyberpunk metropolis. It begins by crossing a yellow zebra crossing toward a blue rotunda building, where neon signs shimmer on the wet pavement and pedestrians carry glowing umbrellas. As the camera leaves the open street, it transitions into a shadowed alley and ascends a set of concrete stairs, passing wall posters and a descending figure before emerging into a covered pedestrian walkway with polished floors and teal benches. The scene then narrows into a darker corridor, passing a blue kiosk and following a man in a suit toward a bright exit. Finally, the camera breaks out of the enclosure into a vast open plaza, tilting upward to reveal massive skyscrapers draped in holographic advertisements and neon lights.
